# btpservice_cicd_job_credentials (Data Source)

Lists the credential IDs that a build of a given job is allowed to use in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_job_credentials" "example" {
  job = "my-pipeline-job"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job` (String) Name or ID of the job.

### Read-Only

- `credential_ids` (List of String) The list of credential IDs configured for the job.
